input.background: A study takes an SRS from a population of full-term infants. The standard deviation of birth weights in this population is 2 pounds.
input.question: Calculate 95% confidence intervals for μ for samples in which n=81 and \bar{x}=6.1 pounds.

sample_size.description: The number of full-term infants in the sample.

sample_mean.description: The mean birth weight of the sample of full-term infants.

population_std_dev.description: The standard deviation of birth weights in the population of full-term infants.

confidence_level.description: The confidence level for the confidence interval.

meta_info.caption: Newborn weight.
meta_info.section: 10.2 Confidence Intervals for $\mu$ When $\sigma$ Is Known
